name: DGB Financial Group Co., Ltd.
summary: DGB Financial Group Co., Ltd. provides various banking products and services primarily in South Korea. The company offers deposit products; insurance policy loans; installment and automobile finance, corporate loans, personal loans, and new technology business finance, as well as leasing services; foreign exchange services; financial products comprising investment funds and bancassurance; and asset management and online banking services. It also provides investment trading, investment brokerage, discretionary investment, and investment advisory services; coverage, endowment, pension, and variable insurance products; electronic payment settlement agency services, as well as issues and manages electronic payment services; and claim collection, credit check, lease inspection, and civil complaint services. In addition, the company offers information system development, operation, maintenance, and integration services; IT consulting and related education services; and e-commerce and Internet related services, as well as sells, rents, and maintains information equipment and software. As of December 31, 2018, it operated through a network of 336 branches. DGB Financial Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is based in Daegu, South Korea.
